retrieved_result: Definition of dog's bollocks, the dog's bollocks, thenoun - pluralthe best. My new computer is state-of-the-art - the dog's bollocks. The latest model Ferrari? Now that's what I call the dog's bollocks. See more words with the same meaning: good, okay, cool, awesome, fun. Last edited on Jul 22 2012. Submitted by Steve on Oct 11 199
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result defines a slang term and contains no content related to easy DIY room decoration ideas.
